title: DST NIDHI i-TBI Ignition Grant 2.0
author: Sharda Launchpad + DST
excerpt: Science & technology based solutions for rural or societal problems. Idea stage eligible, prototype not required.
description: DST NIDHI i-TBI Ignition Grant 2.0 offers up to ₹10 Lakhs in government-backed funding for founders building science and technology solutions for rural or societal challenges. No prototype is required — a strong idea at concept stage is enough to apply. Backed by the Department of Science & Technology (DST), this grant not only provides capital but also adds significant government credibility to your startup, which strengthens future funding applications and tender eligibility. For first-time founders applying to a government grant, DST NIDHI is one of the most reliable starting points in India.
whoQualifies: Science & technology based solutions for rural or societal problems
Idea stage eligible, prototype not required
realWorldValue: Socho — sirf ek strong idea hai aur koi prototype nahi, phir bhi ₹10 Lakhs mil sakte hain? DST NIDHI exactly yahi karta hai. Rural problems ke liye tech solution banane wale founders ke liye yeh pehla bada mauka hai. DST ka naam attached hone se future mein government tenders mein aapki credibility automatically strong ho jaati hai. Seedha simple baat — paisa bhi, credibility bhi, aur koi equity nahi.

title: O'Shaughnessy Fellowships & Grants
author: O'Shaughnessy Ventures (OSV)
excerpt: Unconventional, non-mainstream ideas from any domain. Non-dilutive funding with global recognition.
description: O'Shaughnessy Fellowships & Grants is a rare global opportunity for founders working on unconventional or out-of-the-box ideas that mainstream investors often overlook. US-based O'Shaughnessy Ventures (OSV) offers up to ₹90 Lakhs in completely non-dilutive funding — no equity, no interest — and Indian founders are fully eligible. There are no sector restrictions; OSV deliberately funds ideas that don't fit conventional molds. Beyond the capital, being selected brings global recognition and access to OSV's worldwide network, which is extremely valuable for future fundraising and international partnerships. if your idea is truly different, don't miss this.
whoQualifies: Any domain — no sector restriction
Unconventional, non-mainstream ideas preferred
Idea stage founders eligible
India eligible (global program)
realWorldValue: koi equity nahi, koi interest nahi, aur India se bhi apply ho sakta hai. OSV woh fund hai jo deliberately 'weird bets' lagata hai. Agar aapka idea itna unique hai ki koi VC samjhta hi nahi — toh OSV bilkul aapke liye banaa hai. Sirf paisa nahi, global recognition bhi milti hai jo India mein future fundraising ke waqt investors ke liye strong signal hoti hai. Honestly, India mein itna bada non-dilutive global grant bahut kam milta hai.

title: IHFC–ARTPARK–Siemens Healthineers MedTech Grant
author: IIT Delhi + IISc Bengaluru + Siemens
excerpt: MedTech startups aligning with Siemens' 4 specific problem statements. Idea stage acceptable.
description: The IHFC–ARTPARK–Siemens Healthineers MedTech Grant is one of India's most prestigious medtech funding opportunities, offering up to ₹2 Crore jointly from IIT Delhi, IISc Bengaluru, and Siemens Healthineers. This grant is exclusively for startups that directly address one of Siemens' 4 defined problem statements — so carefully review those before applying. Idea stage founders are eligible, meaning no working prototype is required. The most significant advantage here is that Siemens typically deploys the solutions it funds within its hospital network, meaning your funder could also become your first paying customer. This combination is extremely rare in India.
whoQualifies: MedTech startup
Must align with Siemens' 4 specific problem statements ONLY
Idea stage acceptable
realWorldValue: ₹2 Crore idea stage pe milna already extraordinary hai. Lekin asli game yeh hai: Siemens jo problem statement fund karta hai, woh typically usi solution ko apne hospital network mein deploy karta hai. Matlab jo aapko fund kar raha hai, woh hi aapka pehla customer ban sakta hai. IIT Delhi + IISc + Siemens — teen bade naam ek saath. Future VC rounds mein yeh combination bahut strong credibility signal deta hai.

title: NSTEP – Student Innovation & Entrepreneurship
author: Nutrihub ICAR-IIMR + Ministry of Agriculture
excerpt: For students or research scholars with millet-based product or technology ideas.
description: NSTEP is a dedicated grant from the Ministry of Agriculture and Nutrihub ICAR-IIMR specifically for students and research scholars working on millet-based technology or product ideas. Eligible students can receive up to ₹4 Lakhs in government-backed funding without needing any prototype — just a strong idea at concept stage. This amount provides 4–6 months of meaningful runway to validate your idea, build initial prototypes, and conduct user research. Additionally, selected students gain access to ICAR's network of 100+ research institutes, which is an extraordinary resource for any agri founder. Having a government-backed grant on your profile also strengthens future career and fundraising prospects significantly.
whoQualifies: Students or research scholars ONLY
Millet-based product or technology idea
Idea stage
realWorldValue: Student ho aur ₹4 Lakhs chahiye? ICAR + Ministry of Agriculture ki government-backed grant hai yeh. ₹4L matlab 4-6 mahine ka full runway — idea validate karo, prototype banao, user interviews karo. Sabse bada bonus: ICAR ka 100+ research institutes ka network access milta hai jo kisi bhi agri startup ke liye investors se zyada valuable hota hai early stage mein. Aur resume mein 'government-backed grant winner' likha ho toh future mein kaafi doors khulte hain.

title: NEST: Startup Training Program
author: Nutrihub ICAR-IIMR + Ministry of Agriculture
excerpt: Millet-based innovation startups at MVP stage. Includes structured training program.
description: NEST is a unique program from Nutrihub ICAR-IIMR and the Ministry of Agriculture that combines up to ₹5 Lakhs in funding with a structured training program — a combination that is genuinely rare in India's grant ecosystem. It is designed for millet-based innovation startups at MVP stage. Beyond the capital, selected startups gain direct access to ICAR's 100+ research institutes and 700+ Krishi Vigyan Kendras, which provides real farmer connections, distribution channels, and government agri ecosystem access. For agri startups, this network is often more valuable at the early stage than a standard investor cheque. Attending the training program is a condition of the grant.
whoQualifies: Millet-based innovation startups
MVP stage
Training program attend karna hoga
realWorldValue: Funding + training ek saath — yeh combo India mein bahut kam milta hai. ₹5L ke saath ICAR ke 100+ research institutes aur 700+ KVKs ka seedha network milta hai. Agri startup ke liye seedhi baat: yeh network kisi VC cheque se zyada kaam aata hai early stage mein. Real farmers, real distribution channels, real government connections — sab ek program se. Training attend karna padega, lekin worth it hai.

title: NGRAIN: Agripreneurship Program
author: Nutrihub ICAR-IIMR + Ministry of Agriculture
excerpt: For agripreneurs or millet-focused startups with early revenue. Market expansion capital.
description: NGRAIN is designed for millet-focused agripreneurs and startups that are already generating early revenue and want to expand into new markets. The program offers up to ₹25 Lakhs from Nutrihub ICAR-IIMR and the Ministry of Agriculture — with zero equity and zero interest. This capital can be deployed toward new geographies, distribution channel development, or product line extension. India's millet market is currently one of the fastest-growing agricultural segments, and NGRAIN-selected startups also gain access to ICAR's national distribution network and government agri procurement pipeline, which can be far more valuable than the grant itself in the long run.
whoQualifies: Agripreneur or millet-focused startup
Early revenue stage — kuch sales hona chahiye
Millet value chain mein operate karna chahiye
realWorldValue: Revenue aa raha hai aur scale karna hai? ₹25L market expansion ke liye — new cities, new distributors, new product lines. Zero equity, zero interest matlab pure free capital hai. Millet market India ka fastest-growing agri segment hai abhi — timing bilkul sahi hai. Aur ICAR ka national distribution network saath milta hai jo ₹25L se bhi zyada valuable hai long term mein.

title: DST NIDHI Seed Support – ACIC VGU Foundation
author: ACIC VGU Foundation
excerpt: Tech startups at MVP stage. Apply with or without incubation at ACIC VGU.
description: The DST NIDHI Seed Support Program through ACIC VGU Foundation provides up to ₹50 Lakhs in seed funding to tech startups at MVP stage in Rajasthan. You can apply whether or not you are already incubated at ACIC VGU. As one of India's most trusted government seed programs with over 25 years of operation, DST NIDHI's backing adds strong national credibility to your startup — a signal that private VCs take seriously in future funding rounds. For Rajasthan-based founders, this program is significantly underutilized, meaning competition is comparatively lower.
organization: ACIC VGU Foundation (Vivekananda Global University, Rajasthan)
whoQualifies: Tech startup
ACIC VGU mein incubated ho ya saath apply karo
MVP stage
realWorldValue: DST NIDHI India ke sabse trusted government seed programs mein se ek hai — 25+ saal se chal raha hai. ₹50L ka matlab sirf paisa nahi, DST ka brand naam bhi attached ho jaata hai. Future mein jab bhi private VC se baat karo, 'DST-backed startup' sunke woh seriously lete hain. Rajasthan mein competition bhi kam hai is grant ke liye — matlab chances better hain. MVP ready hai? Abhi apply karo.

title: ADITI 4.0 Challenge Grant – iDEX
author: Defence Innovation Organisation (iDEX), MoD
excerpt: India's largest startup grant for defence deeptech startups with MVP ready solutions.
description: ADITI 4.0 is India's single largest startup grant, offering up to ₹25 Crore from iDEX (Defence Innovation Organisation) under the Ministry of Defence. This is not just capital — it is a direct entry into India's defence procurement ecosystem. Winners are actively considered for MoD procurement pipeline opportunities, which means a successful ADITI win can translate into multi-year recurring government revenue streams. Defence deeptech startups and MSMEs with a working MVP are eligible. DPIIT registration is preferred.if you operate in the defence space, this is the most important application you can make this year.
whoQualifies: Defence deeptech startup or MSME
MVP ready — working solution hona chahiye
DPIIT registration preferred
realWorldValue: India ka sabse bada startup grant — ₹25 Crore. Yeh sun ke hi dil bada ho jaata hai. Lekin asli value aur bhi zyada hai: iDEX winners MoD ke procurement pipeline mein directly aa jaate hain — matlab ek baar win kiya toh multi-year government revenue stream ban jaata hai. Defence contracts baar baar renew hote hain. Ek deal, recurring paisa. Defence deeptech mein ho aur MVP ready hai? Bas karo apply.

title: Defence India Startup Challenge 14 (DISC 14)
author: Defence Innovation Organisation (iDEX)
excerpt: 82 military problem statements to choose from. Idea stage eligible for deeptech solutions.
description: DISC 14 is iDEX's 14th edition of its flagship defence startup challenge, offering up to ₹1.5 Crore to startups and MSMEs that can solve any one of 82 defined military problem statements. The sheer breadth of 82 problem statements means that almost every deeptech, hardware, or AI founder will find at least one relevant challenge to address. Idea stage founders are eligible — a working prototype is not required. A strong performance in DISC also opens doors to future NATO country partnerships and international defence export opportunities.
whoQualifies: Startup or MSME
82 military problem statements mein se kisi ek pe solution ho
Idea stage se eligible
realWorldValue: 82 problem statements — matlab almost koi bhi deeptech founder kuch na kuch relevant zaroor dhundh lega. ₹1.5 Crore + defence credibility ka combination india mein kaafi rare hai. Aur yeh socho — ek defence win India ke baad NATO countries aur international exports ke liye bhi door kholta hai. Idea stage eligible hai, toh abhi prototype nahi hai toh bhi apply karo. Bas ek strong solution idea chahiye.

title: DRISHTI Challenges – DPSUs
author: HAL, BEL, DRDO units
excerpt: DeepTech or hardware startups with defence-relevant solutions. Idea stage eligible.
description: DRISHTI Challenges is a unique innovation program from India's Defence Public Sector Undertakings — HAL, BEL, and DRDO units — offering a wide funding range of ₹5 Lakhs to ₹10 Crore for deeptech and hardware startups with defence-relevant solutions. What makes this program particularly compelling is that the organizations funding you are also the ones most likely to become your first customers — creating a direct circular advantage that almost no other grant offers. Idea stage founders are eligible.
organization: Defence Public Sector Undertakings (HAL, BEL, DRDO units)
whoQualifies: DeepTech or hardware startup
Defence-relevant solution
Idea stage se eligible
realWorldValue: Yeh program ka sabse smart angle yeh hai: HAL, BEL, BEML — yeh log aapko fund karte hain aur phir aapse hi product khareedते bhi hain. Fund bhi unka, customer bhi wahi. Yeh circular advantage kisi aur grant mein nahi milta. ₹10 Crore ceiling ke saath defence PSU relationship — early stage ke liye isse better deal nahi ho sakti. Hardware ya deeptech mein ho toh seriously consider karo.

title: IITK FinTech Spark Program
author: SIIC, IIT Kanpur
excerpt: For IITK undergraduate students with FinTech ideas or early prototypes.
description: The IITK FinTech Spark Program is an exclusive grant from IIT Kanpur's SIIC (Startup Incubation & Innovation Centre) for undergraduate students of IITK who have a FinTech idea or early prototype. Selected students receive up to ₹6 Lakhs along with IIT Kanpur's institutional credibility and direct access to SIIC's investor network — connections to angels and VCs that would otherwise take years to develop independently. For a student founder, this program dramatically shortens the timeline to meaningful capital and mentorship.
whoQualifies: IITK undergraduate students ONLY
FinTech idea or early prototype
Idea stage
realWorldValue: IIT Kanpur student ho? ₹6L + IIT brand + SIIC investor network — yeh combo baaki students ke paas nahi hota. SIIC ke through jo angel aur VC connections milte hain, woh normally career ke 5-7 saal baad milte hain. Yeh program woh shortcut hai. FinTech mein idea hai toh abhi apply karo. Aur honestly, IITK student hoke yeh miss karna galat hoga.

title: Pusa Krishi Grant-in-Aid Program 2026
author: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare
excerpt: Bold, innovative agriculture ideas for agripreneurs or students. Stage flexible.
description: The Pusa Krishi Grant-in-Aid Program 2026 from the Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare offers up to ₹25 Lakhs to agripreneurs and students with bold agricultural innovation ideas. This program grants access to Pusa Institute — the core of India's agriculture research ecosystem — and through it, connections to ICAR research centers, Krishi Vigyan Kendras, and state agriculture departments across the country. These connections to distribution networks and government procurement channels are often worth significantly more than the grant itself for early-stage agri founders. Stage is flexible — both idea and early prototype stages are eligible.
whoQualifies: Agripreneur or student
Bold, innovative agriculture idea
Stage flexible
realWorldValue: Pusa Institute India ka agriculture research ecosystem ka dil hai. ₹25L ke saath jo network milta hai — ICAR, KVK, state agri departments — yeh connections honestly paisa se zyada kaam aate hain. Ek distribution deal ya government agri procurement contract ₹25L se 10x zyada value de sakta hai. Stage flexible hai — idea bhi chalega.

title: TDB India-Finland Joint Innovation Call 2026
author: Technology Development Board + Business Finland
excerpt: R&D focused startup or company. Sustainable energy, digital tech, or microelectronics. MVP stage required.
description: The TDB India-Finland Joint Innovation Call 2026 is a rare government-to-government R&D funding collaboration between India's Technology Development Board and Business Finland, offering up to ₹2.5 Crore in non-dilutive funding to startups in cleantech, digital technology, and microelectronics. The dual backing of TDB and Finland's government makes this one of the most credible international grants available to Indian deeptech founders, and it also opens a potential pathway into the EU market. A working MVP is required, and having a Finland-based partner is beneficial but not mandatory .
whoQualifies: R&D focused startup or company
Sustainable energy, digital tech, or microelectronics
MVP stage — working concept hona chahiye
Finland partner hona beneficial
realWorldValue: Government-to-government funding — yeh India mein bahut rare hai. ₹2.5 Crore non-dilutive + TDB aur Finland ki dual backing matlab EU market entry ka seedha rasta khulta hai. Cleantech ya semiconductor mein ho toh yeh literally dream grant hai. 128 din hain — matlab time bhi hai properly prepare karne ka. Deeptech founder ke liye equity-free ₹2.5 Crore milna India mein kahin aur nahi hota.

title: D.E.S.I.G.N. for BioE3 Challenge
author: DBT + BIRAC
excerpt: Indian citizen with biotech concept proposal. Prototype not required. Idea stage eligible.
description: The D.E.S.I.G.N. for BioE3 Challenge is a concept-stage grant from the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) and BIRAC, offering ₹1 Lakh to ₹25 Lakhs to Indian citizens with innovative biotech proposals — no prototype required. BioE3 is India's new national biotechnology policy, and being selected for this program creates a natural pipeline into BIRAC's larger funding programs, including BIRAC BIG (₹50 Lakhs) and BIRAC SPARK (₹2 Crore).  This is the most accessible entry point into India's formal biotech funding ecosystem.
whoQualifies: Indian citizen
Biotech concept proposal — prototype zaruri nahi
Idea stage
realWorldValue: 192 din — matlab koi rush nahi, properly prepare kar sakte ho. Sirf ek strong biotech concept proposal chahiye, koi prototype nahi. ₹25L milne ke alawa jo sabse bada benefit hai: yeh BIRAC ecosystem mein entry point hai. Iske baad BIRAC BIG (₹50L) aur BIRAC SPARK (₹2 Crore) ke liye aapki application automatically strong ho jaati hai. Biotech mein ho toh yeh ladder ka pehla step hai — ignore mat karo.

title: Idea Grant – KSUM
author: Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM)
excerpt: Kerala-based tech startup at idea stage. No prototype required. Innovative technology focus.
description: KSUM's Idea Grant is the ideal starting point for Kerala-based tech founders who are at the concept stage with no prototype yet. The grant provides up to ₹3 Lakhs in non-dilutive funding — enough to cover domain registration, cloud infrastructure, user interviews, and basic prototype development. More importantly, this is the first step of KSUM's complete funding ladder, which progressively unlocks the Productisation Grant (₹7L), BCDD Grant – Kerala (OBC Founders)(₹10L) ,Scaleup Seed Fund(₹25), Market Acceleration Grant (₹10L), and Scaleup Grant (₹15L) — totaling over ₹35 Lakhs in potential non-dilutive capital. The program is always open on a rolling basis — Kerala tech founders can apply at any time.
whoQualifies: Kerala-based tech startup
Idea stage — prototype nahi chahiye
Innovative technology focus
realWorldValue: Kerala mein tech startup hai? Toh KSUM ka Idea Grant pehla kaam hona chahiye. ₹3L milte hain — domain, hosting, user interviews, basic prototype sab ho jaata hai. Lekin asli value yeh hai ki yeh KSUM ke poore funding ladder ka darwaza kholta hai — iske baad ₹7L, ₹10L, ₹15L sab ek ke baad ek available hote hain. Total ₹35L+ non-dilutive capital ka rasta yahan se shuru hota hai. Rolling basis pe open hai — kal bhi apply kar sakte ho.

title: Women/Transgender Productization Grant – KSUM
author: Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM)
excerpt: Women-led or transgender-led Kerala-based startup at MVP stage.
description: KSUM's Women/Transgender Productization Grant is one of India's rare dedicated funding programs for women-led and transgender-led startups, offering up to ₹5 Lakhs for MVP-stage productization in Kerala. India has almost no mainstream funding pathways specifically for transgender founders — this program directly fills that gap. For women founders, the competition for this specific grant is comparatively lower, which means acceptance rates are naturally higher. The funding is completely non-dilutive — no equity, no interest. If you are an eligible founder in Kerala at MVP stage, applying to this program is an obvious decision. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: Women-led or transgender-led startup
Kerala-based
MVP stage
realWorldValue: India mein transgender founders ke liye dedicated government grant — yeh genuinely rare hai. Women founders ke liye bhi competition bahut kam hai is specific grant mein, matlab selection chances zyada hain. ₹5L non-dilutive, zero equity, zero interest. Kerala mein ho, women ya transgender-led startup hai, MVP ready hai — toh honestly apply karna no-brainer hai. Iss type ka support kahi aur nahi milta itni asaani se.

title: Soft Loan – Women Entrepreneurs KSUM
author: Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM)
excerpt: Women entrepreneur in Kerala with early revenue and government/PSU project order.
description: KSUM's Soft Loan Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs is designed for Kerala women founders who have secured a confirmed government or PSU project order but need working capital to fulfill it. The scheme provides up to ₹15 Lakhs at low interest rates — and since revenue is effectively guaranteed by an existing order, the loan carries minimal financial risk. This is one of the most intelligent working capital solutions available at this stage, as it directly addresses cash flow timing issues rather than adding long-term debt burden. Always open on a rolling basis for eligible women entrepreneurs in Kerala.
whoQualifies: Women entrepreneur in Kerala
Early revenue stage
Government or PSU project order hona chahiye
realWorldValue: Government ya PSU order confirm ho gaya hai — matlab revenue guaranteed hai. Lekin order fulfill karne ke liye working capital chahiye? KSUM ka soft loan exactly isi ke liye hai — ₹15L low interest pe. Jab revenue confirm hai toh yeh loan almost risk-free hai. Kerala ki women founders ke liye yeh ek underused gem hai — bahut kam log apply karte hain. Order hai toh paisa kahan se aayega tension nahi — KSUM se lo.

title: BCDD Grant – Kerala (OBC Founders)
author: Kerala Startup Mission + BCDD
excerpt: OBC category graduate with Kerala-based tech startup at idea stage.
description: The BCDD Grant is a joint initiative by KSUM and Kerala's Backward Classes Development Department, offering up to ₹10 Lakhs in non-dilutive funding to OBC category graduates building tech startups in Kerala. The competition for this specific grant is comparatively lower, as it targets a defined segment of founders — meaning acceptance rates are higher than open grants. Beyond the capital, this grant serves as a formal entry point into the KSUM ecosystem, unlocking access to KSUM's full funding ladder of subsequent grants worth up to ₹35 Lakhs. Zero equity, government-backed. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: OBC category graduate
Kerala-based tech startup
Idea stage
realWorldValue: OBC ho aur Kerala mein tech startup hai? ₹10L government-backed, zero equity — aur competition bhi comparatively kam hai OBC-specific grants mein. Sirf paisa nahi, KSUM ecosystem mein entry milti hai jo future mein ₹7L, ₹10L, ₹15L grants ke liye rasta kholta hai. Total ₹35L+ non-dilutive capital ka rasta yahan se shuru ho sakta hai. Eligible ho toh apply karna aaj hi karo.

title: TN Space Tech Fund – StartupTN
author: Tamil Nadu Government — StartupTN
excerpt: Space tech startup with prototype stage. Tamil Nadu connection preferred.
description: The TN Space Tech Fund from StartupTN offers up to ₹50 Lakhs to space technology startups at prototype stage, with a preference for Tamil Nadu-connected companies. India's space sector was fully opened to private players under the New Space Policy 2023, and Tamil Nadu — home to Sriharikota and a growing aerospace manufacturing base — is positioning itself as the country's space startup hub. Government backing from StartupTN provides a strong foundation for IN-SPACe recognition and ISRO commercial division engagement. Eligible sectors include satellite tech, launch vehicle components, space data analytics, earth observation, and ground station technology. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: Space tech startup
Prototype stage — working proof of concept hona chahiye
Tamil Nadu connection preferred
realWorldValue: Space sector ab private players ke liye open hai — IN-SPACe, ISRO commercial, New Space Policy 2023. Yeh wave ka sahi time hai. ₹50L + Tamil Nadu government ki backing = IN-SPACe recognition ke liye strong signal milta hai. Prototype stage pe government se itna bada funding space mein India mein aur kahin nahi milta. Tamil Nadu Sriharikota ke paas hai — geography bhi favorable hai space startup ke liye.

title: Tamil Nadu SC/ST Startup Fund – StartupTN
author: StartupTN
excerpt: SC/ST founder-led startup in Tamil Nadu at MVP stage.
description: Tamil Nadu's SC/ST Startup Fund is a dedicated equity funding program from StartupTN specifically for SC/ST founder-led startups registered in Tamil Nadu at MVP stage. Historically, SC/ST founders have faced significant barriers accessing VC funding in India — this government-backed equity program directly addresses that gap by providing capital outside the traditional VC ecosystem. It is one of the few targeted programs in India that specifically routes equity capital to underrepresented founder communities. Tamil Nadu-registered SC/ST founders with a working MVP should actively explore this program. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: SC/ST founder-led startup
Tamil Nadu registered
MVP stage
realWorldValue: SC/ST founders ke liye India mein VC access historically bahut limited raha hai — yeh sachchai hai. Tamil Nadu ka yeh fund directly uss gap ko fill karta hai — government-backed equity jo mainstream VC process bypass karti hai. Tamil Nadu mein ho, SC/ST founder ho, MVP ready hai — yeh program directly aapke liye banaya gaya hai. Rare opportunity hai, seriously explore karo.

title: EDII Tamil Nadu Innovation Voucher Programme
author: EDII Tamil Nadu
excerpt: Tamil Nadu manufacturing MSME or startup at idea stage with product innovation focus.
description: The EDII Tamil Nadu Innovation Voucher Programme offers ₹3–7 Lakhs in funding to manufacturing-focused MSMEs and startups in Tamil Nadu for prototype development and product commercialization. Tamil Nadu is India's second-largest manufacturing state, with major industrial clusters in automotive, textiles, and electronics — and this voucher program grants access to that procurement and distribution network. Idea stage applicants are eligible, meaning no working prototype is required. Selected startups also gain an entry point into the state government procurement pipeline, which can open significant B2G revenue opportunities. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: Tamil Nadu manufacturing MSME or startup
Idea stage
Product innovation focus
realWorldValue: Tamil Nadu India ka 2nd largest manufacturing state — auto, textiles, electronics sab yahan hai. EDII voucher se sirf ₹3-7L nahi milta, state procurement pipeline mein entry bhi milti hai. Government contracts ke liye consider hone ka rasta khulta hai. Manufacturing MSME ya startup ho Tamil Nadu mein — idea stage se bhi apply kar sakte ho. Competition kam hai is voucher ke liye comparatively.

title: Innovation Voucher Program – iTNT Hub + EDII-TN
author: iTNT Hub + EDII Tamil Nadu
excerpt: Tamil Nadu hardware startup or MSME at idea stage with hardware product development focus.
description: The Innovation Voucher Program from iTNT Hub and EDII Tamil Nadu is specifically designed to help hardware startups and MSMEs in Tamil Nadu overcome the high cost of prototype development — the most common early-stage barrier for hardware founders. Selected recipients gain access to Tamil Nadu's Chennai-Hosur electronics manufacturing hub, which has grown significantly more valuable following the arrival of Samsung and TSMC semiconductor operations in the state. Idea stage applicants are eligible. Always open on a rolling basis for Tamil Nadu hardware founders.
whoQualifies: Tamil Nadu hardware startup or MSME
Idea stage
Hardware product development focus
realWorldValue: Hardware founders ke liye prototype cost sabse bada dard hota hai early stage mein. iTNT Hub voucher exactly isi problem solve karta hai — prototype funding milti hai. Aur Tamil Nadu ka Chennai-Hosur electronics hub ab aur bhi powerful ho gaya hai TSMC aur Samsung ke plants aane ke baad. Hardware mein ho Tamil Nadu mein — yeh voucher ek seriously valuable resource hai. Idea stage bhi eligible hai.

title: Agri-Tech Grant Scheme – Tamil Nadu Govt
author: Tamil Nadu Dept of Agricultural Marketing & Agri Business
excerpt: Agritech startup at idea stage with Tamil Nadu connection helpful.
description: Tamil Nadu's Agri-Tech Grant Scheme provides ₹10–25 Lakhs to agritech startups for agricultural innovation aligned with the state's marketing and agribusiness priorities. Tamil Nadu's agricultural export sector is valued at over ₹1 Lakh Crore, and this program unlocks access to state farmer networks, government agri procurement channels, and distribution partnerships that can deliver far greater long-term value than the grant itself. Idea stage applicants are eligible, and a Tamil Nadu connection is helpful but not mandatory. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Tamil Nadu Dept of Agricultural Marketing & Agri Business
whoQualifies: Agritech startup
Idea stage se eligible
TN connection helpful
realWorldValue: Tamil Nadu ka agri export sector ₹1 Lakh Crore+ ka hai — iss market mein enter karna chahte ho? ₹10-25L grant ke saath state procurement pipeline aur farmer network access milta hai. Ek distribution deal ya government agri contract ₹25L se 10x zyada value de sakta hai long term mein. Idea stage eligible hai — agritech mein ho Tamil Nadu se toh apply karo.

title: Patent Reimbursement Incentives – Karnataka (KBITS)
author: KBITS, Government of Karnataka
excerpt: Karnataka startup, KBITS registered and incubated, patent filed or planning to file.
description: KBITS's Patent Reimbursement Incentive scheme reimburses Karnataka-incubated startups ₹2–10 Lakhs for patent filing costs — covering both domestic patents (₹20–50K) and international PCT applications (₹2–5L). Building a strong IP portfolio is a critical credibility signal for investors, particularly in hardware and deeptech sectors, and Karnataka's government makes this completely free for KBITS-registered and incubated startups. Multiple patents can be filed at zero net cost, strengthening your startup's valuation and investor positioning. KBITS registration and incubation is a prerequisite. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: Karnataka startup
KBITS registered and incubated
Patent filed or planning to file
realWorldValue: Patent filing expensive hota hai — domestic ₹20-50K, international PCT ₹2-5L. Karnataka government yeh full cost cover karta hai KBITS incubated startups ke liye. IP portfolio build hoti hai zero cost pe. Investors — especially hardware aur deeptech investors — strong IP dekhke serious hote hain. Karnataka mein ho aur patent file karna hai? KBITS mein register karo aur yeh scheme le lo.

title: Marketing Incentives – Karnataka (International Marketing)
author: KBITS, Government of Karnataka
excerpt: Karnataka KBITS-registered startup with international marketing activities. Women founders priority.
description: Karnataka KBITS's International Marketing Incentive scheme reimburses Karnataka-registered startups up to ₹5 Lakhs for participation in international trade shows, exhibitions, and global marketing activities. Events like CES Las Vegas, Hannover Messe, and Singapore Fintech Festival typically cost ₹3–5 Lakhs to attend — Karnataka's government covers this expense, making global visibility effectively free. Women founders are given priority consideration in this scheme, improving their acceptance chances further. Always open on a rolling basis for KBITS-registered Karnataka startups.
whoQualifies: Karnataka KBITS-registered startup with international marketing activities
realWorldValue: CES, Hannover Messe, Singapore Fintech — yeh events attend karna ₹3-5L kharcha karta hai. Karnataka government yeh pura reimburse karta hai. Matlab global visibility ka kharcha effectively zero ho jaata hai. Women founders ko priority milti hai — matlab unke liye acceptance chances aur better hain. Karnataka mein KBITS registered ho aur global event attend kiya ho — toh abhi claim karo.

title: GST Reimbursement – Karnataka Startup Policy
author: KBITS, Government of Karnataka
excerpt: Karnataka startup physically incubated at KBITS facility with goods supply and turnover under Rs.50L.
description: Karnataka Startup Policy's GST Reimbursement scheme refunds the GST paid by startups physically incubated at KBITS facilities and supplying goods, provided their turnover is below ₹50 Lakhs. This effectively reduces the tax burden to zero for eligible early-stage startups, directly improving net margins without any change in revenue. GST compliance is a real financial burden at the early stage, and this scheme eliminates it entirely for qualifying companies. Always open on a rolling basis for KBITS-incubated Karnataka startups.
whoQualifies: Karnataka startup physically incubated at KBITS facility with turnover under Rs.50L
realWorldValue: Early stage mein GST compliance ek real financial burden hoti hai. Karnataka ki yeh scheme effective tax zero kar deti hai KBITS incubated startups ke liye — jo bhi GST pay kiya woh wapas mil jaata hai. Net margin improve hota hai bina revenue badhe. KBITS facility mein incubated ho aur goods supply karte ho — yeh scheme automatically aapke liye hai, claim karo.

title: Seed Funding for Startups – Haryana (HARTRON)
author: Haryana Govt + HARTRON
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup at idea stage in any tech domain.
description: Haryana Government and HARTRON (Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation) jointly offer up to ₹10 Lakhs in direct seed funding to DPIIT-recognized Haryana tech startups at idea stage — with zero equity. Founders operating in Gurugram, Faridabad, Panchkula, and Chandigarh are eligible. The Delhi NCR proximity of the Haryana ecosystem also provides naturally better investor access compared to most other states. Despite being a strong program, it is significantly underutilized by Haryana founders, meaning competition is lower than comparable national grants. DPIIT recognition is required. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup at idea stage
realWorldValue: Haryana mein startup hai aur DPIIT recognized hai? ₹10L seedha government se, zero equity. Gurugram, Faridabad, Chandigarh — sab eligible hain. Delhi NCR mein hone ki wajah se investor access bhi good hai. HARTRON program bahut founders miss kar jaate hain — competition less hai yahi reason hai. DPIIT recognition hai toh abhi apply karo.

title: Haryana Startup Policy – Lease Rental Subsidy
author: Department of Industries, Haryana
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup with office space lease. Women-led enhanced amount.
description: Haryana Startup Policy's Lease Rental Subsidy scheme reimburses 50% of office rent — up to ₹5 Lakhs total — for DPIIT-recognized startups operating in the state. In cities like Gurugram, where monthly office rent commonly exceeds ₹1 Lakh, this scheme effectively halves operational costs. Women-led startups receive an enhanced benefit amount. The reimbursement process is straightforward and directly reduces monthly burn rate for eligible startups. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup with office space lease
realWorldValue: Gurugram mein office rent ₹1L+ per month normal hai. Haryana government 50% cover karti hai — ₹5L total tak. Matlab office ka effective cost half ho jaati hai. Women founders ke liye aur bhi better terms hain. DPIIT recognized Haryana startup hai aur office lease hai — yeh claim karna chahiye, seedha paisa bachta hai burn rate se.

title: Haryana Patent Cost Reimbursement
author: Department of Industries, Haryana
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup with patent filed or planning to file. Domestic + international eligible.
description: Haryana's Patent Cost Reimbursement scheme offers up to ₹25 Lakhs to DPIIT-recognized startups for domestic and international patent filing costs — making it one of India's most generous patent support programs. This amount is sufficient to file multiple international PCT applications, allowing startups to build a comprehensive IP portfolio at zero net cost. A strong IP portfolio directly increases valuation multiples and investor confidence, particularly for deeptech and hardware startups. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup with patent filed or planning to file
realWorldValue: ₹25L patent reimbursement — India mein kisi bhi state ka yeh ek highest patent support amount hai. Multiple international patents file ho sakte hain is amount se. Strong IP portfolio = valuation multiple badhti hai — investors aur acquirers dono IP portfolio seriously lete hain. Haryana deeptech ya hardware startup hai? IP cost zero karo Haryana government ke through.

title: Net SGST Reimbursement – Haryana
author: Department of Industries, Haryana
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup that is SGST paying entity with active operations.
description: Haryana's Net SGST Reimbursement scheme refunds 50% of the State Goods & Services Tax paid by DPIIT-recognized startups operating in the state. For a startup with ₹1 Crore in revenue, this translates to approximately ₹4–5 Lakhs in annual savings — a recurring benefit that compounds each year as revenue grows. This is an automatic cash flow improvement that requires minimal additional effort beyond filing the reimbursement claim. Always open on a rolling basis for DPIIT-recognized Haryana startups with active SGST obligations.
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup that is SGST paying entity
realWorldValue: Har saal ₹4-5L automatically bachte hain agar ₹1 Crore revenue hai — sirf 50% SGST reimburse hone se. Yeh recurring benefit hai — har saal milta rehta hai. Cash flow improvement direct hoti hai, aur iske liye koi extra kaam nahi karna, sirf claim karo. Haryana mein DPIIT recognized ho aur SGST pay karte ho — iss scheme ko activate karo aaj hi.

title: Cloud Storage Reimbursement – Haryana
author: Department of Industries, Haryana
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Haryana tech startup using cloud services.
description: Haryana's Cloud Storage Reimbursement scheme provides up to ₹2.5 Lakhs in reimbursement for cloud infrastructure costs — AWS, GCP, or Azure — incurred by DPIIT-recognized tech startups in the state. For SaaS and AI startups, cloud bills can easily reach ₹1–3 Lakhs per month, making this reimbursement a meaningful reduction in monthly burn rate. This is a direct, practical benefit that tech founders should claim as a matter of course. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Haryana tech startup using cloud services
realWorldValue: SaaS ya AI startup ke liye AWS/GCP/Azure bill ₹1-3L monthly hota hai. Haryana government ₹2.5L reimburse karti hai — seedha burn rate kam hota hai. Tech startup ke liye cloud infrastructure ek major expense hai early stage mein — yeh scheme directly uss problem solve karti hai. Haryana mein DPIIT recognized tech startup ho aur cloud use karte ho — claim karo.

title: Assistance for Acceleration Programs – Haryana
author: Department of Industries, Haryana
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup that joined recognized acceleration program.
description: Haryana's Assistance for Acceleration Programs scheme reimburses DPIIT-recognized startups up to ₹2.5 Lakhs for fees and travel costs associated with joining recognized acceleration programs such as YC, Techstars, T-Hub, or Google for Startups. In effect, the Haryana government subsidizes participation in top-tier accelerators — making world-class mentorship and network access available at zero net cost. This is one of the most underutilized schemes in Haryana's startup policy, with very few founders currently claiming it. Always open on a rolling basis.
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Haryana startup in recognized acceleration program
realWorldValue: YC, Techstars, T-Hub, Google for Startups — in programs ki fees aur travel ₹2-3L hoti hai. Haryana government ₹2.5L reimburse karti hai — matlab top accelerator join karo aur cost effectively zero ho jaati hai. Haryana ke founders ke beech yeh scheme seriously underused hai — bahut kam log jaante hain iske baare mein. Accelerator join kiya hai? Abhi claim karo.

title: MP Startup Policy – Sustenance Allowance
author: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized MP startup at idea or early stage with active full-time founders.
description: Madhya Pradesh Startup Policy's Sustenance Allowance provides DPIIT-recognized full-time founders with ₹10,000 per month — up to ₹1.2 Lakhs total — as a monthly stipend for living expenses. In MP cities like Bhopal, Indore, and Jabalpur, where the cost of living is significantly lower than metros, this amount provides meaningful financial cushion that allows a founder to work on their startup full-time without relying on part-time income. For first-time entrepreneurs and student founders, this stipend can be the difference between pursuing the venture full-time or not. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized MP startup at idea or early stage with active full-time founders
realWorldValue: ₹10K per month — chhota lagta hai, lekin MP ke tier-2 cities mein yeh living cost cover kar deta hai. Matlab ek founder part-time job chhod ke full-time startup pe focus kar sakta hai. Government stipend ke saath 12 mahine ka runway milta hai sirf exist karne ke liye — aur is time mein idea validate karo, MVP banao, aur traction lao. Simple lekin effective scheme

title: Patent Assistance – MP Startup Policy
author: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized MP startup with patent filing in tech domain.
description: MP Startup Policy's Patent Assistance scheme reimburses up to ₹5 Lakhs in patent filing costs for DPIIT-recognized Madhya Pradesh tech startups. This amount is sufficient to cover 2–3 domestic patent filings or one complete PCT international application. Building an IP portfolio at zero cost directly improves valuation multiples and is particularly valuable when preparing for investor due diligence or acquisition discussions. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized MP startup with patent filing in tech domain
realWorldValue: ₹5L mein 2-3 domestic patents ya ek international PCT application file ho sakti hai — IP portfolio build zero cost pe. Future mein VC se raise karo ya acquisition hogi toh IP portfolio valuation multiple badhata hai. MP mein DPIIT recognized ho aur tech domain mein ho — patent filing government ke paise se karo.

title: MP State Innovation Challenge
author: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized startup with high-impact solution deploying in MP in any tech domain.
description: The MP State Innovation Challenge is one of Madhya Pradesh's highest-value startup grants, offering up to ₹1 Crore to DPIIT-recognized startups deploying high-impact tech solutions within the state. Beyond the capital, the government's act of funding your solution typically positions it for state procurement contracts — meaning MP Government can become both your funder and your first customer. A government deployment case study is a powerful proof point for future private investors. Madhya Pradesh has a population of over 8.5 Crore — an immediate large-scale addressable market for the right solution. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized startup with high-impact solution deploying in MP
realWorldValue: ₹1 Crore + government as first customer — yeh combination bahut powerful hai. MP mein deploy karo matlab 8.5 Crore population market mein seedha entry. Government deployment = ek solid reference case study jo future VCs ke liye strong proof point hoti hai. Aur ₹1 Crore grant bhi saath. MP mein high-impact solution hai — yeh opportunity seriously consider karo.

title: MP Startup Policy – Investment-Linked Assistance
author: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized MP startup with SEBI/RBI recognized investor funding. Women-led extra bonus.
description: MP Startup Policy's Investment-Linked Assistance is a match funding scheme — when a SEBI or RBI-recognized investor invests in your DPIIT-recognized MP startup, the state government adds up to ₹15 Lakhs on top. Effectively, a ₹30 Lakh angel raise becomes ₹45 Lakhs through this program. Women-led startups receive additional bonus amounts. This double-funding model also signals to investors that the state government is backing the ecosystem, which itself increases investor confidence. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized MP startup with SEBI/RBI recognized investor funding
realWorldValue: Angel ne invest kiya — government upar se ₹15L aur degi. Simple math: ₹30L angel raise karo, ₹15L government free mein add hoti hai, total ₹45L ho jaata hai. Women founders ke liye aur bhi better terms hain. Yeh scheme MP ke founders ke liye fundraising ka double incentive deti hai — investor bhi impress hota hai jab government match funding kare.

title: MP Startup Policy – Margin Money & Interest Subsidy
author: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized MP startup at early revenue stage taking bank loan.
description: MP Startup Policy's Margin Money & Interest Subsidy scheme provides up to ₹47 Lakhs in combined margin money support and bank loan interest subsidy for DPIIT-recognized startups at early revenue stage. This scheme significantly reduces the actual cost of bank-financed working capital — making bank loans effectively low-cost or near-free for eligible founders. Startups that are scaling through debt rather than equity will find this program highly valuable. It is among the most financially impactful and underutilized schemes in MP's startup policy. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized MP startup at early revenue stage taking bank loan
realWorldValue: Bank loan lo aur MP government interest subsidy + margin money dono deti hai — ₹47L tak ka combined benefit. Effectively bank loan almost free ho jaata hai. Working capital chahiye aur debt financing explore kar rahe ho — MP mein DPIIT recognized ho toh yeh scheme seriously consider karo. MP ke founders iss scheme ko bahut underutilize karte hain.

title: MP Startup Policy – Lease Rental Assistance
author: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized MP startup with office space lease, eligible for 3 years.
description: MP Startup Policy's Lease Rental Assistance scheme provides ₹5,000 per month for up to 3 years to DPIIT-recognized MP startups with office leases, totaling up to ₹1.8 Lakhs in cumulative reimbursement. While the monthly amount is modest, this is a recurring, low-effort benefit that consistently reduces operational overhead throughout the early stages of a startup's lifecycle. It should be claimed by every eligible MP founder as a matter of course. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of MSME, Government of MP
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized MP startup with office space lease
realWorldValue: ₹5K/month chhota lagta hai — lekin 3 saal mein ₹1.8L total bach jaate hain bina koi extra effort ke. Early stage mein har ₹1 count karta hai. Yeh recurring benefit hai jo automatically milta rehta hai. MP mein DPIIT recognized ho aur office lease hai — yeh claim karna chahiye, seedha burn rate reduce hoti hai.

title: Punjab Startup Policy – Seed Funding
author: Dept of Industries, Government of Punjab
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Punjab startup at MVP stage in any tech domain.
description: Punjab Government offers up to ₹15 Lakhs in direct seed funding to DPIIT-recognized tech startups at MVP stage — with zero equity. For Ludhiana (manufacturing), Amritsar (agriculture), and Chandigarh (technology) founders, this represents one of the most direct capital access points available, particularly given Punjab's historically limited VC ecosystem. Government seed funding carries no dilution and no interest, making it a strong first capital source before engaging external investors. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of Industries, Government of Punjab
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Punjab startup at MVP stage
realWorldValue: Punjab mein VC funding bahut limited hai — yeh sachchai hai. Toh government seed funding ka importance aur zyada hai yahan. ₹15L direct grant, zero equity — Ludhiana, Amritsar, Chandigarh sab eligible. MVP ready hai aur Punjab mein DPIIT recognized ho — abhi apply karo. Punjab ke founders iss scheme ko bahut miss karte hain.

title: Punjab Startup Policy – Interest Subsidy
author: Dept of Industries, Government of Punjab
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Punjab startup with scheduled bank loan at MVP stage.
description: Punjab Startup Policy's Interest Subsidy scheme provides up to ₹5 Lakhs per year in interest reimbursement for DPIIT-recognized startups with scheduled bank loans at MVP stage. On a ₹50 Lakh bank loan, interest payments typically amount to ₹4–5 Lakhs annually — Punjab's subsidy effectively makes this working capital loan free. When combined with Punjab's seed funding, founders can access over ₹20 Lakhs in total capital at zero cost. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of Industries, Government of Punjab
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Punjab startup with scheduled bank loan at MVP stage
realWorldValue: ₹50L bank loan pe ₹4-5L interest — Punjab government yeh pay karti hai. Effectively free working capital loan milta hai. Seed funding ke saath combine karo — Punjab mein ₹20L+ total capital stack mil sakta hai zero cost pe. DPIIT recognized ho aur bank loan liya hai — interest subsidy claim karna seedha paisa bachata hai.

title: Punjab Startup Policy – Lease Rental Subsidy
author: Dept of Industries, Government of Punjab
excerpt: DPIIT-recognized Punjab startup with office space lease and Punjab-based operations.
description: Punjab Startup Policy's Lease Rental Subsidy scheme reimburses up to ₹3 Lakhs in office rent for DPIIT-recognized startups with Punjab-based operations. This amount typically covers 1–2 years of office rent in cities like Chandigarh or Ludhiana. The claim process is straightforward and directly reduces monthly burn rate. This subsidy should be claimed by every eligible Punjab founder as a matter of course. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of Industries, Government of Punjab
whoQualifies: DPIIT-recognized Punjab startup with office space lease and Punjab-based operations
realWorldValue: Chandigarh ya Ludhiana mein office rent ₹20-30K monthly hai — ₹3L total reimbursement matlab 1-1.5 saal ka rent effectively free. Simple claim process hai. Punjab ke doosre schemes ke saath milao — seed funding + interest subsidy + lease subsidy = significant total savings. DPIIT recognized ho aur office lease hai — abhi claim karo.

title: Bihar Startup Policy 2022 – Seed Grant
author: Dept of Industries, Government of Bihar
excerpt: Bihar-registered startup at validation or MVP stage. Women/SC/ST/differently-abled extra bonus.
description: Bihar Startup Policy 2022's Seed Grant provides up to ₹10 Lakhs in interest-free seed funding to Bihar-registered startups at validation or MVP stage. VC funding in Bihar is extremely limited, making this government grant one of the most important capital sources for Bihar-based entrepreneurs. Women founders, SC/ST founders, and differently-abled founders receive additional bonus amounts. The funding is interest-free and collateral-free. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of Industries, Government of Bihar
whoQualifies: Bihar-registered startup at validation or MVP stage
realWorldValue: Bihar mein VC funding dhundhna almost impossible hai — yeh reality hai. Patna ya Bihar ke kisi bhi city mein build kar rahe ho — yeh scheme aapke liye hai.

title: Bihar Startup Policy – Zero Patent Filing Cost
author: Dept of Industries, Government of Bihar
excerpt: Bihar-registered startup (state certified) with patent filed or planning to file.
description: Bihar Startup Policy's Zero Patent Filing Cost scheme provides 100% reimbursement of patent filing costs for state-certified Bihar-registered startups. This means the Bihar government covers the entire expense of domestic patent filings, enabling founders to build a comprehensive IP portfolio at zero net cost. A strong IP portfolio directly strengthens investor positioning and acquisition valuation. This is one of the most generous patent support programs among Indian state policies. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of Industries, Government of Bihar
whoQualifies: Bihar-registered startup (state certified) with patent filed or planning to file
realWorldValue: 100% patent filing cost — zero rupaya. Bihar mein IP portfolio build karna literally free hai state certification ke baad. Bihar ke doosre schemes ke saath combine karo — seed grant + patent zero cost + success fee = solid capital stack banta hai. Bihar ka startup ecosystem develop ho raha hai — early movers ko sabse zyada benefit milega.

title: Bihar Startup Policy – Success Fee Scheme
author: Dept of Industries, Government of Bihar
excerpt: Bihar-registered startup with external funding secured at early revenue stage.
description: Bihar Startup Policy's Success Fee Scheme is a bonus matching program — when a Bihar-registered startup secures external funding at early revenue stage, the state government adds a success bonus on top of the investor's cheque. The bonus amount scales with the funding raised, creating a double incentive for Bihar founders to fundraise actively. This scheme effectively amplifies the impact of private investment by layering government capital on top. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of Industries, Government of Bihar
whoQualifies: Bihar-registered startup with external funding secured at early revenue stage
realWorldValue: External funding raise ki — government bonus degi upar se. Jitna raise karo utna zyada bonus. Yeh simple lekin powerful incentive hai — private investor ka confidence + government bonus dono ek saath milta hai. Bihar mein fundraising kar rahe ho toh yeh scheme activate karo — double paisa milne ka mauka hai.

title: Jharkhand Startup Policy – Sustenance Allowance
author: Dept of IT & E-Governance, Government of Jharkhand

In cities like Ranchi and Jamshedpur, where the cost of living is significantly lower than metros, this stipend provides meaningful financial support that allows founders to work on their startup full-time without relying on part-time income. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of IT & E-Governance, Government of Jharkhand
whoQualifies: Jharkhand-registered startup under Rs.25Cr turnover, under 5 years, with active full-time founders
realWorldValue: Ranchi, Jamshedpur mein living cost kam hai — monthly stipend se full-time startup pe focus kar sakte ho bina kisi part-time job ke. Yeh small amount hai lekin psychological aur financial cushion dono milti hai. Jharkhand ka startup ecosystem grow ho raha hai — early movers ko maximum benefit milega. Under 5 saal old startup ho — abhi activate karo.

title: Jharkhand Startup Policy – Marketing Assistance
author: Dept of IT & E-Governance, Government of Jharkhand
excerpt: Jharkhand-registered startup under Rs.25Cr turnover, under 5 years old.
description: Jharkhand Startup Policy's Marketing Assistance scheme provides up to ₹10 Lakhs to Jharkhand-registered startups under ₹25 Crore turnover and less than 5 years old. This capital can be deployed toward digital marketing campaigns, sales team hiring, trade show participation, and brand building — all critical go-to-market expenses that the state government effectively covers. The eligibility criteria are straightforward, and the funding directly accelerates market reach. Always open on a rolling basis.

whoQualifies: Jharkhand-registered startup under Rs.25Cr turnover, under 5 years old

Under 5 saal old aur ₹25Cr se kam turnover — simple eligibility. Jharkhand mein build kar rahe ho — market mein jaane ka kharcha government se lo.

title: Jharkhand Startup Policy – Patent Reimbursement
author: Dept of IT & E-Governance, Government of Jharkhand
excerpt: Jharkhand startup under Rs.25Cr turnover with patent filed or planning to file.
description: Jharkhand Startup Policy's Patent Reimbursement scheme provides 100% reimbursement of patent filing costs for Jharkhand-registered startups under ₹25 Crore turnover. A strong IP portfolio is a critical valuation driver for investor discussions and acquisition negotiations. Full patent cost coverage is among the most generous state-level IP support programs in India. Always open on a rolling basis.

Mining, steel, agri tech — Jharkhand ke core sectors mein innovative solutions pe patent karo aur cost zero raho. Under ₹25Cr turnover eligible hai — doosre Jharkhand schemes ke saath combine karo maximum benefit ke liye.

title: Jharkhand Startup Policy – Rental Assistance
author: Dept of IT & E-Governance, Government of Jharkhand
excerpt: Jharkhand startup in STPI, SEZ, or IT Park with office.
description: Jharkhand Startup Policy's Rental Assistance scheme provides up to ₹5 Lakhs in rent reimbursement for Jharkhand startups operating from STPI, SEZ, or IT Park locations. The government effectively covers 50% of the rent, enabling founders to access premium tech park infrastructure at half the market price. As Ranchi's tech ecosystem develops, positioning your startup in an IT park now is a strategic move for future networking and ecosystem access. Always open on a rolling basis.

title: Jharkhand Startup Policy – Utility Bills Reimbursement
author: Dept of IT & E-Governance, Government of Jharkhand
excerpt: Jharkhand-registered startup with internet or electricity bills.
description: Jharkhand Startup Policy's Utility Bills Reimbursement scheme provides up to ₹60,000 in reimbursement for internet and electricity bills incurred by Jharkhand-registered startups. This is a straightforward, low-effort benefit that every eligible Jharkhand founder should claim as a matter of course. The application process is simple, and the reimbursement directly reduces monthly operational overhead. Always open on a rolling basis.
organization: Dept of IT & E-Governance, Government of Jharkhand
whoQualifies: Jharkhand-registered startup with internet or electricity bills
realWorldValue: ₹60K chhota amount lagta hai, lekin zero effort application hai. Internet + electricity bills hain — bas claim karo. title: Maharashtra Startup Week – MSInS
author: Maharashtra State Innovation Society
excerpt: Maharashtra-based startup at early stage in any innovative domain.
description: Maharashtra Startup Week by MSInS (Maharashtra State Innovation Society) offers up to ₹15 Lakhs to Maharashtra-based early-stage startups with innovative ideas across any domain. Maharashtra is India's largest startup state, with Mumbai, Pune, and Nashik forming a cohesive ecosystem. MSInS funding also creates a pathway into Maharashtra's state procurement pipeline, which serves a population of over 12 Crore. Government-backed status in India's largest state market is a strong credibility signal. Always open on a rolling basis.
